3032630.name: Accident Liquidator
3032630.description:
Accident Liquidator is an exciting 3D arcade action-adventure game that throws you into situations where each day presents new challenges necessary for survival.

Game Features:
- Story and Objectives:
You find yourself in various emergency situations, and your goal is to survive. Every day you will face tasks related to survival.
- Top-Down View:
The game is presented in a top-down view, allowing you to see the environment and plan your actions.
- Mouse Control:
You control the character with the mouse. Just click on the location where you want to move the hero, and he will go there.
- 3D Graphics
